chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-258 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 15-09-2025 M/s. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani and Hayat Muhammad, Advocates for the petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, assisted by Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, Deputy Prosecutor General. -------- Mr. Javed Ahmed Soomro Advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.9. Taken on record. Statements filed by official respondents are also taken on record. Counsel for the petitioner submits that official respondents are harassing the petitioner party at the behest of private respondents. Whereas official respondents submit that the allegations levelled against them are false and fabricated. Be that as it may, the official respondent are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner as and when required. Accordingly the petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
